text:
was a mobile puzzle game created by MediaMagic Co.,Ltd., based on the Yurushito series as part of the Evangelion 20th Anniversary promotion. It was released on iOS and Android based smartphones on 04 September 2015 (Android) and on 09 December 2015 (iOS).

Overview

It is a Three Match Puzzle game with RPG mechanics like upgrading the level of your characters to improve the gameflow. There are in-app purchases named "Yurucoins." https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2015-09-09/evangelion-yurishito-angel-mascot-gets-its-own-puzzle-rpg-app/.92650
